llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Payroll & People Data Analyst - Mandarin Speaker (Leasing, 9 month contract)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: Objectives of the Position Seek to understand business needs and provide support, services and solution on payroll, HR data, HR systems and processes. Offer day-to-day support to service recipients on HR inquiries, work collaboratively with others and perform research on payroll and HR data practices by staying abreast of current and emerging market insights and legal legislations in local countries. Participate in process improvements, automation, and digitalization measures to offer best service delivery experience. Main Tasks Operational Excellence Ensure data quality and data integrity for Payroll and HR data processes. Receive, analyze, process and follow-up on personnel administration requests via multiple request channels, ensure accurate and timely interface to the respective internal/ external processing chains i.e. payroll, finance, data analytics, external service providers, local authorities etc. Manage entire termination workflow for all termination types which includes leaves calculations, information checks, letters preparation, systems updates, payment calculations and exit clearance. Responsible for time and attendance administrations, including manual calculations on time allowances/deductions, maintenance of work schedules, leaves, overtimes, and shift substitutions. Support the delivery of payroll inputs and administration i.e. employee subsidies, fleet management, long service awards etc. Support the salary review exercises on employee data preparation, letter generations and new salary processing. Responsible for the local labor administrative activities and scheduled statutory HR reporting, ensure timely and compliant deliveries as per legislation requirements. Responds to recurring or ad-hoc business needs to design and to deliver country specific or customized reports which could not be auto-generated by the analytics/reporting systems. Work closely with other teams and external service providers to ensure all service requests are completed accurately and timely. Service Engagement Providing advisory on employee enquiries, policy/guidelines clarifications, HR processes, HR systems guides, legislation processes etc. Monitor multiples service requests to ensure services delivered by the team are in accordance with established Service Level Agreement (SLA) and internal Key Performance Indicators (KPI). Perform research and information gathering on local market HR news, legislation updates and guidelines to maintain internal knowledge...
